title.en: Coral Reef Fluorescence — UV-Blue → Green/Red Glow

subtitle.en: corals express GFP-like proteins that absorb the abundant blue-violet light and fluoresce green/orange/red
subtitle.ko: 산호가 GFP-family 단백질로 청보라 흡수 → 녹/주/적 형광

description.en: Reef scene under white vs UV-blue light. Many corals carry GFP-family proteins; ~30% of species express them.
description.ko: 백색·UV-blue 산호 장면. ~30% 산호 종이 GFP 패밀리 발현.
